description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: .2 - Technical Process](305e2bd6-a594-4aec-8713-adbe7bc87120) must still be carried out. However, the timing of these announcements no longer constrains the modification of parameters. These announcements must also state that the offboarding is being expedited and explain the reasons for this accelerated process.
